title: Asset License Compliance — gitignore, fallbacks, setup, credits

tasks.title: Add .gitignore rules and untrack non-redistributable assets
tasks.scope: Add gitignore rules for public/assets/Modern_Office_Revamped_v1.2/, public/assets/office/furniture.png, and public/assets/office/room-builder.png. Run git rm --cached on all three to untrack them. Run git rm -r 'public/assets/Modern tiles_Free/' to delete the non-commercial free pack entirely. Verify with git status.

dod.criterion: .gitignore contains rules that exclude public/assets/Modern_Office_Revamped_v1.2/, public/assets/office/furniture.png, and public/assets/office/room-builder.png
git ls-files shows none of the non-redistributable assets are tracked
public/assets/Modern tiles_Free/ directory is deleted from the repo (git rm -r)

tasks.title: Create setup-assets.sh script for developer onboarding
tasks.scope: Create scripts/setup-assets.sh that checks if LimeZu tileset files exist, if missing prints purchase URL and exact copy commands, validates placed files, idempotent and safe to re-run.

dod.criterion: scripts/setup-assets.sh exists, is executable, and runs without errors on macOS/Linux
When assets missing, prints purchase URL (https://limezu.itch.io/modernoffice) and file placement instructions
When assets present, prints 'assets already installed' and exits cleanly
Checks all three paths: Modern_Office_Revamped_v1.2/, office/furniture.png, office/room-builder.png

tasks.title: Improve console warnings to reference setup script
tasks.scope: Update catch-block console.warn messages in asset-loader.ts, tileset-loader.ts, and tilesetCache.ts to mention setup-assets.sh. Do NOT change fallback logic.

dod.criterion: asset-loader.ts loadFloorAssets catch block mentions setup-assets.sh
tileset-loader.ts loadLimeZuSprites catch block mentions setup-assets.sh
tilesetCache.ts loadTilesetCache catch block mentions setup-assets.sh
No changes to actual fallback/rendering logic

tasks.title: Update asset README and add credits/attribution to the game UI
tasks.scope: Rewrite public/assets/office/README.md with accurate fallback description and setup-assets.sh reference. Create public/assets/README.md with asset structure and license table. Add credits section to game UI (LimeZu, JIK-A-4/MetroCity, walls.png MIT).

dod.criterion: public/assets/office/README.md accurately describes fallback behavior and references setup-assets.sh
public/assets/README.md exists with asset structure overview and license summary table
Game UI includes visible attribution for LimeZu and JIK-A-4 MetroCity
Credits render correctly even without premium assets (fallback mode)
